general.title: General Provisions
general.body: By joining this online education platform, you accept the following terms.

userResponsibility.title: User Responsibility
userResponsibility.body: Users must use the platform only for educational purposes. Any illegal activity is prohibited.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: Your personal information is protected and not shared with third parties.

teacherResponsibility.title: Teacher Responsibility
teacherResponsibility.body: Teachers must provide high-quality educational materials.

studentResponsibility.title: Student Responsibility
studentResponsibility.body: Students must actively participate in courses and follow the platform rules.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Create a new account
register.name: First Name
register.accept_terms: I agree to the terms of use
register.accept_terms_error: You must accept the terms of use

toast.login_error: Incorrect login credentials or account not found
toast.google_error: Google information could not be retrieved
toast.google_load_error: Google login could not be loaded
toast.name_required: Please enter your first and last name
toast.email_phone_required: Please enter your email and phone number
toast.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters

upload.title: Upload Video
upload.drag_drop: Drag & drop your video here, or click to select

teacher.panel_description: This panel is separate from course tests. Exams you create here are sent to admin, then you can track grading and results of used exams.
teacher.create_first_hint: Go to the Create Exam tab to create your first separate exam draft.
teacher.review_description: Enter the exam, then select a student and grade open questions directly here.
teacher.no_reviews_description: Open questions requiring teacher expertise will appear here.
teacher.open_questions_hint: Only open questions requiring teacher review are shown.
teacher.no_pending_questions: No open questions requiring teacher review remain for this student.
teacher.missing_question_text: Question text not found, but answer is awaiting expertise.

tests.subtitle: Course tests
tests.title: My Tests
tests.description: Search for tests linked to courses, filter by course and go to results. Separate teacher exams are managed in the exam panel.

exam_panel.all_questions_checked: All expertise questions in this exam have already been checked.
exam_panel.results_appear_desc: As the admin uses your teacher drafts, final results will appear here.
exam_panel.leave_session_desc: Enter the short manual code visible on the student's overlay. After the preview card opens, make the final decision from the teacher panel.
exam_panel.teacher_only: This section is for teachers only
exam_panel.step_1: 1. Get the short manual code visible on the student's overlay.
exam_panel.step_2: 2. Check the code and confirm the student and exam information on the preview card.
exam_panel.step_3: 3. Make the final decision with the Continue or Stop Exam button.
exam_panel.preview_desc: After the manual code is checked, the student's leave session card will open here.

test.title: Tests
test.description: Test your knowledge and track progress. Solve tests in various subjects.
test.empty_desc: Change search criteria and try again
test.out_of_focus_suspended: Exam suspended because you left the site
test.exam_password_description: Questions will open after entering the password provided by the admin.

rules.rule1: Make only one choice for multiple choice questions
rules.rule2: Open questions (if any) will be checked by the teacher later
rules.rule3: The test will close automatically when the time is up

test.refresh_page_hint: Refresh the page or go back to the exam panel.

edit.allow_retake_desc: If disabled, the test can only be taken once.

home.teacher_team_desc: Our experienced teachers unite different fields as one team.
home.contact_form_desc: Fill out the short form, and we will share a suitable program via WhatsApp.
home.contact_whatsapp_note: Your message is forwarded directly to WhatsApp and the reply is not lost.
home.contact_whatsapp_greeting: Hello, I would like to contact Your Academy.

footer_extra.description: The future of education. The path to success with professional teachers and modern teaching methods.
footer_extra.social_follow_desc: Follow us on social media to stay up to date with the latest news.

loader.loading_desc: The screen will open as soon as the platform is fully loaded.

exam.create_description: This form is separate from course tests. Exams created here are saved as teacher drafts and then sent to admin.
exam.title: Exam title

certificates.description: Certificates of courses you have successfully completed
